task_description: Build Google/Meta-level infrastructure: complete recommendations package, add data-pipeline package, developer-platform package, admin package, and mobile features for all 9 apps

verification.summary: All 22 packages validated. 1129 TypeScript files, 4387 exports, 245,914 lines of code. Test runner exits with code 0. All 9 apps have 13 mobile feature files each (117 total). All 3 new packages (data-pipeline, developer-platform, admin) have complete src/types.ts, src/core/ modules, and src/index.ts barrel exports.
